pack.summary: Arithmetic in Maths - GeeksforGeeks Courses Tutorials Interview Prep Number System and Arithmetic Algebra Set Theory Probability Statistics Geometry Calculus Logarithms Mensuration Matrices Trigonometry Mathematics Arithmetic in Maths Last Updated : 19 Feb, 2026 Arithmetic is the fundamental branch of mathematics that deals with numbers and their basic operations, such as addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. These operations are performed on numbers, which are represented by digits. Arithmetic Operations Learn the fundamental calculations performed on numbers. Addition Subtraction Multiplication Division Exponents Logarithm Properties of Arithmetic Operations Explore the rules that make calculations easier and consistent. Commutative Associative Distributive Identity Higher Arithmetic Study advanced numerical concepts used in real-life problems. Fractions Decimals Percentages Ratios Applications of Arithmetic in Math See how arithmetic is used in patterns, averages, and sequences.
